hero.subtitle: We are on a mission to revolutionize how India prepares for competitive exams. By combining deep pedagogical expertise with cutting-edge AI, we make exam success achievable for everyone — from a small town to a big city.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: To democratize high-quality government exam preparation for every aspirant in India — from mastering the complete UPSC syllabus to cracking MPSC, SSC, and Railway exams — through the power of Artificial Intelligence.

innovation.title: AI Innovation
innovation.desc: We leverage state-of-the-art AI models and real UPSC exam samples to deliver personalized coaching that adapts to each student's unique learning pace and knowledge gaps.

vision.title: Future Vision
vision.desc: Building a future where world-class exam coaching — including MPSC online classes and live doubt sessions — is accessible to every aspirant, regardless of location or financial background.

story.title: The Problem We're Solving
story.p1: Every year, millions of aspirants across India invest years of effort and significant resources preparing for government exams. From navigating the vast UPSC syllabus — covering History, Geography, Polity, Economy, and Current Affairs — to finding authentic UPSC exam samples for practice, the journey is both demanding and expensive.
story.p2: For state-level aspirants, the challenge is no different. Finding reliable and structured MPSC online classes that are also affordable is a struggle for most students outside major cities. High-quality coaching has historically been locked behind expensive institute fees and geography.
story.p3: Sarkari AI was built to change this. We combine the rigor of expert-curated content with the personalization of AI — giving every student access to a smart study planner, real UPSC exam samples for practice, and MPSC online classes-style interactive learning, all in one platform.

exams.subtitle: Comprehensive preparation for India's most sought-after government examinations.

solutions.subtitle: Tools designed to accelerate your learning and maximize performance.

cta.title: Start Your Journey Today
cta.subtitle: Join 50,000+ aspirants who are already using AI-powered UPSC syllabus guides, real UPSC exam samples, and MPSC online classes to achieve their government job dreams.

tutor.title: Personalized AI Tutor
tutor.desc: An interactive AI tutor that identifies your weak areas and guides you through complex UPSC syllabus topics with clarity and depth.

pyq.title: Smart PYQ Analysis
pyq.desc: AI-powered analysis of UPSC exam samples and previous year questions to identify high-yield patterns and predict likely exam topics.

data.title: Data-Driven Insights
data.desc: Detailed performance tracking and predictive analytics to measure your exam readiness and optimize your preparation strategy.

ca.title: Current Affairs
ca.subtitle: Daily exam-focused news updates summarized by AI
ca.dailyFactContent: Strategic preparation and consistency are keys to cracking competitive exams. Review today's news for relevant UPSC/MPSC pointers.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.updated: Last Updated: March 25, 2026. Your trust is our most valuable asset.
privacy.commitmentDesc: Sarkari AI is built with privacy-by-design principles. We never sell your data to third parties.
privacy.intro: At Sarkari AI, we understand that your data is private. This policy outlines how we handle your information with the transparency and respect you deserve.

collection.title: Data Collection
collection.content: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, update your profile, or use our AI tools. This includes your name, email address, language preferences, and performance data from mock tests.

usage.title: How We Use Data
usage.content: Your data is primarily used to personalize your learning experience. Our AI models analyze your performance to identify weak areas and generate customized study plans. We also use aggregated, non-identifiable data to improve our algorithms.

security.title: Data Security
security.content: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information. This includes encryption for data at rest and in transit, regular security audits, and strict access controls for our infrastructure.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information at any time. You can also export your performance data. We believe in complete transparency and give you full control over your digital footprint on our platform.

privacy.cookiesDesc: We use essential cookies to maintain your session and remember your preferences. We also use analytics cookies to understand how users intersect with our platform, which helps us improve the user experience.
privacy.thirdPartyDesc: We use trusted third-party services for essential functions like authentication (Firebase/Google Auth) and AI processing (OpenRouter/OpenAI). These providers only receive the data necessary to perform their specific services.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.desc: If you have any questions about our privacy practices or wish to exercise your data rights, please contact our privacy team at privacy@sarkaraiai.com.
